title: pyrus globosa
intro: Pyrus globosa, also known as the Chinese pear, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to China. The bark, leaves, and fruit of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus globosa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Pyrus globosa include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the bark, leaves, or fruit in hot water or a solvent.
